name: Yole Cloud Storage Operations Test Bank
description: CRUD and resilience tests for all 8 storage protocols: WebDAV, FTP, SFTP, SMB, Git, Dropbox, GoogleDrive, OneDrive

test_cases.name: List files from WebDAV storage

steps.name: Select configured WebDAV storage
steps.action: Open storage selector, choose WebDAV server

steps.name: Verify file listing
steps.expected: Files and folders shown with names, sizes, and dates

test_cases.expected_result: WebDAV file listing works including subdirectory navigation

test_cases.name: List files from each configured protocol

steps.name: List FTP files
steps.action: Switch to FTP storage and list root

steps.name: List SFTP files
steps.action: Switch to SFTP storage and list root

steps.name: List SMB files
steps.action: Switch to SMB storage and list share root

test_cases.expected_result: All 6 additional protocols list files from their root

test_cases.name: Upload file to WebDAV

steps.name: Initiate upload
steps.action: Tap/click 'Upload' or drag a local file
steps.expected: File picker or drag target active

steps.name: Select local file
steps.action: Choose a local .md file to upload

steps.name: Verify upload complete
steps.expected: Uploaded file appears in WebDAV listing

test_cases.expected_result: File uploaded to WebDAV and visible in remote listing

test_cases.name: Upload file to Dropbox

steps.name: Upload a file
steps.action: Select a local .txt file for upload

steps.name: Confirm appearance
steps.expected: Uploaded file visible with correct name and size

test_cases.expected_result: File uploaded to Dropbox successfully

test_cases.name: Upload large file shows progress

steps.name: Select a large file (1MB+)
steps.action: Choose a 1MB+ text file for upload to any protocol

steps.name: Verify completion
steps.expected: Success message; file appears in remote listing

test_cases.expected_result: Large file upload shows incremental progress

test_cases.name: Download file from SFTP

steps.name: Browse SFTP storage
steps.action: Open SFTP storage, navigate to a file

steps.name: Open/download file
steps.action: Tap/click the file to open in Yole editor
steps.expected: File downloaded and opened in editor

test_cases.expected_result: File downloaded from SFTP and opened in editor

test_cases.name: Download file from Google Drive

steps.name: Open a document
steps.expected: File downloaded and opened in Yole editor

test_cases.expected_result: Google Drive file opens in Yole editor

test_cases.name: Delete file from FTP with confirmation

steps.name: Browse FTP storage
steps.action: Navigate to a test file on FTP

test_cases.expected_result: File deleted from FTP after confirmation

test_cases.name: Cancel delete leaves file intact

steps.name: Initiate delete on a file
steps.action: Select delete for a cloud file

steps.name: Cancel
steps.expected: Dialog dismissed, file remains in listing

test_cases.expected_result: Cancel delete leaves file unmodified

test_cases.name: Rename file on OneDrive

steps.name: Select file on OneDrive
steps.action: Open OneDrive storage, long-press a file

test_cases.expected_result: File renamed on OneDrive

test_cases.name: Create directory on SMB share

steps.name: Create new folder
steps.expected: Folder created and appears in listing

test_cases.expected_result: Directory created on SMB share

test_cases.name: Sync status indicators update correctly

steps.name: Open a cloud-backed file
steps.action: Open a file from WebDAV storage in editor

steps.name: Save to cloud
steps.expected: Upload progress shown, then status returns to 'Synced'

test_cases.expected_result: Sync status correctly reflects file state transitions

test_cases.name: Offline mode serves cached content

steps.name: Open a cloud file while online
steps.action: Open a WebDAV file to populate cache

steps.name: Disable network
steps.action: Turn off WiFi or enable airplane mode

steps.name: Reopen the same file
steps.action: Close and reopen the cloud file
steps.expected: File opens from cache with 'Offline' indicator

steps.name: Edit while offline
steps.action: Make changes to the cached file
steps.expected: Edits accepted; pending sync indicator shown

test_cases.expected_result: Offline mode serves cached content and queues changes

test_cases.name: Pending changes sync when back online

steps.name: Make offline edits
steps.action: Edit a cloud file while offline
steps.expected: Changes saved locally with pending sync flag

steps.name: Restore network
steps.action: Re-enable WiFi or disable airplane mode

steps.name: Verify sync
steps.expected: Pending changes uploaded; sync indicator clears

test_cases.expected_result: Offline edits automatically synced when network restored

test_cases.name: Connection lost mid-upload handled gracefully

steps.name: Start uploading a large file
steps.action: Begin uploading a 500KB file to any cloud protocol

steps.name: Verify no corrupt file
steps.expected: Partial upload not listed or marked as incomplete

test_cases.expected_result: Mid-upload connection loss handled; retry succeeds

test_cases.name: Connection lost mid-download shows error and retry

steps.name: Begin downloading a cloud file
steps.action: Open a large file from cloud storage

steps.name: Drop connection
steps.expected: Download fails with network error toast or dialog

steps.name: Retry
steps.action: Tap 'Retry' or reopen file after restoring network

test_cases.expected_result: Download failure shows retry option that works

test_cases.name: Concurrent uploads to same protocol

steps.name: Upload multiple files simultaneously
steps.action: Select 3 files and upload all at once to WebDAV

steps.name: Monitor progress
steps.action: Check that progress is shown for each file
steps.expected: Individual progress indicators for each upload

steps.name: Verify completion
steps.expected: All 3 files appear in cloud listing

test_cases.expected_result: Concurrent uploads complete without errors or data corruption

test_cases.name: Rate limiter throttles excessive requests

steps.name: Trigger rapid API calls
steps.action: Rapidly refresh Dropbox listing 20 times in quick succession

steps.name: Observe throttling
steps.expected: Rate limit indicator shown; requests queued or delayed

steps.name: Wait for recovery
steps.action: Stop triggering requests and wait 10 seconds

test_cases.expected_result: Rate limiter prevents API flooding and self-recovers

test_cases.name: Circuit breaker opens after repeated failures

steps.name: Cause repeated connection failures
steps.action: Configure WebDAV with unreachable server, attempt 5 operations
steps.expected: First few attempts show connection errors

steps.name: Verify circuit breaker opens
steps.expected: Circuit breaker open message: 'Service temporarily unavailable'

steps.name: Wait for half-open state
steps.expected: Circuit breaker allows one probe request

steps.name: Restore server and probe
steps.expected: Circuit breaker closes; normal operation resumes

test_cases.expected_result: Circuit breaker opens on failures and closes on recovery

test_cases.name: Git: commit and push changes

steps.name: Open file from Git-backed storage
steps.action: Open a file from configured Git repository

steps.name: Enter commit message and confirm
steps.action: Enter 'Update note via Yole' and confirm
steps.expected: Changes committed and pushed to remote

test_cases.expected_result: File changes committed and pushed to Git remote

test_cases.name: Git: pull remote changes updates local file

steps.name: Open Git storage with remote changes available
steps.action: Ensure remote has commits not yet pulled

steps.name: Verify updated content
steps.action: Open a file that was changed remotely

test_cases.expected_result: Git pull fetches remote changes and updates local files
